if_then_statement: IF front_distance IS close THEN risk_level IS high
description: Short spacing should already be considered high risk before other factors are added.

if_then_statement: IF front_distance IS medium THEN risk_level IS medium
description: A medium following gap is a moderate baseline condition.

if_then_statement: IF front_distance IS far THEN risk_level IS low
description: A large following gap starts from a low-risk baseline.

if_then_statement: IF speed IS high THEN risk_level IS medium
description: Very high speed should raise risk even before spacing is considered.

if_then_statement: IF road_condition IS poor THEN risk_level IS medium
description: Poor grip raises risk independent of spacing.

if_then_statement: IF front_distance IS close AND speed IS high THEN risk_level IS critical
description: Close spacing at high speed is immediately critical.

if_then_statement: IF front_distance IS close AND speed IS medium THEN risk_level IS high
description: Close spacing at medium speed remains strongly hazardous.

if_then_statement: IF front_distance IS close AND speed IS low THEN risk_level IS medium
description: Short spacing at low speed is still non-negligible.

if_then_statement: IF front_distance IS close AND road_condition IS poor THEN risk_level IS critical
description: Poor grip turns short spacing into a critical condition.

if_then_statement: IF front_distance IS close AND road_condition IS normal THEN risk_level IS high
description: Normal grip does not make a short headway safe.

if_then_statement: IF front_distance IS medium AND speed IS high THEN risk_level IS high
description: A medium gap can become risky when speed is high.

if_then_statement: IF front_distance IS medium AND speed IS medium AND road_condition IS good THEN risk_level IS low
description: A healthy road surface makes medium spacing at cruise speed relatively safe.

if_then_statement: IF front_distance IS medium AND speed IS medium AND road_condition IS poor THEN risk_level IS high
description: Moderate speed with degraded grip elevates a medium gap to high risk.

if_then_statement: IF front_distance IS medium AND speed IS low AND road_condition IS good THEN risk_level IS low
description: Low speed and good grip make a medium gap comfortable.

if_then_statement: IF front_distance IS far AND speed IS high AND road_condition IS good THEN risk_level IS low
description: A very large gap and good grip offset much of the high-speed risk.

if_then_statement: IF front_distance IS far AND speed IS high AND road_condition IS poor THEN risk_level IS medium
description: Poor grip keeps some residual risk even when spacing is large.

if_then_statement: IF front_distance IS far AND speed IS medium THEN risk_level IS low
description: Long spacing at moderate speed should remain low risk.

if_then_statement: IF front_distance IS far AND speed IS low THEN risk_level IS low
description: Long spacing at low speed is safely low risk.

if_then_statement: IF lane_deviation IS far_left THEN lane_stability IS strong_right
description: A large left offset requires a strong right correction as a baseline.

if_then_statement: IF lane_deviation IS left THEN lane_stability IS right
description: A left offset should request a right correction.

if_then_statement: IF lane_deviation IS centered THEN lane_stability IS centered
description: A centered vehicle should default to lane keeping.

if_then_statement: IF lane_deviation IS right THEN lane_stability IS left
description: A right offset should request a left correction.

if_then_statement: IF lane_deviation IS far_right THEN lane_stability IS strong_left
description: A large right offset requires a strong left correction as a baseline.

if_then_statement: IF lane_deviation IS left AND speed IS high THEN lane_stability IS strong_right
description: At high speed, moderate left drift requires stronger correction.

if_then_statement: IF lane_deviation IS right AND speed IS high THEN lane_stability IS strong_left
description: At high speed, moderate right drift requires stronger correction.

if_then_statement: IF lane_deviation IS left AND steering_stability IS unstable THEN lane_stability IS strong_right
description: Unstable steering amplifies left-drift urgency.

if_then_statement: IF lane_deviation IS right AND steering_stability IS unstable THEN lane_stability IS strong_left
description: Unstable steering amplifies right-drift urgency.

if_then_statement: IF lane_deviation IS far_left AND steering_stability IS stable THEN lane_stability IS right
description: Stable steering allows a slightly softer recovery from far-left deviation.

if_then_statement: IF lane_deviation IS far_right AND steering_stability IS stable THEN lane_stability IS left
description: Stable steering allows a slightly softer recovery from far-right deviation.

if_then_statement: IF lane_deviation IS far_left AND speed IS high THEN lane_stability IS strong_right
description: A large left offset at high speed remains a severe event.

if_then_statement: IF lane_deviation IS far_right AND speed IS high THEN lane_stability IS strong_left
description: A large right offset at high speed remains a severe event.

if_then_statement: IF lane_deviation IS centered AND steering_stability IS unstable THEN lane_stability IS centered
description: Steering noise without lane error should not introduce a directional steering bias.

if_then_statement: IF lane_deviation IS left AND speed IS low AND steering_stability IS stable THEN lane_stability IS right
description: At low speed a moderate right correction is enough for left drift.

if_then_statement: IF lane_deviation IS right AND speed IS low AND steering_stability IS stable THEN lane_stability IS left
description: At low speed a moderate left correction is enough for right drift.

if_then_statement: IF traffic_density IS light THEN comfort_efficiency IS high
description: Light traffic supports a comfort-oriented pace as a baseline.

if_then_statement: IF traffic_density IS moderate THEN comfort_efficiency IS medium
description: Moderate traffic encourages a balanced comfort-efficiency target.

if_then_statement: IF traffic_density IS heavy THEN comfort_efficiency IS low
description: Dense traffic suppresses the desire to preserve speed.

if_then_statement: IF road_slope IS downhill THEN comfort_efficiency IS high
description: Downhill travel naturally favors smooth momentum retention.

if_then_statement: IF road_slope IS flat THEN comfort_efficiency IS medium
description: Flat roads produce a neutral baseline comfort target.

if_then_statement: IF road_slope IS uphill THEN comfort_efficiency IS low
description: Uphill travel reduces comfort-oriented speed retention.

if_then_statement: IF road_slope IS flat AND traffic_density IS light AND current_speed IS medium THEN comfort_efficiency IS high
description: Flat road, light traffic, and cruise speed favor maintaining pace.

if_then_statement: IF road_slope IS flat AND traffic_density IS moderate AND current_speed IS medium THEN comfort_efficiency IS high
description: Moderate traffic still supports efficient cruising on flat terrain.

if_then_statement: IF road_slope IS uphill AND traffic_density IS heavy THEN comfort_efficiency IS low
description: Uphill driving in dense traffic discourages aggressive pace keeping.

if_then_statement: IF road_slope IS uphill AND current_speed IS high THEN comfort_efficiency IS low
description: High-speed uphill travel reduces comfort and efficiency.

if_then_statement: IF road_slope IS uphill AND traffic_density IS light AND current_speed IS low THEN comfort_efficiency IS medium
description: Low speed on an uphill road can remain balanced when traffic is light.

if_then_statement: IF road_slope IS downhill AND traffic_density IS light AND current_speed IS medium THEN comfort_efficiency IS high
description: A mild downhill with light traffic favors smooth momentum retention.

if_then_statement: IF road_slope IS downhill AND current_speed IS high THEN comfort_efficiency IS medium
description: Downhill motion at high speed should moderate comfort-driven acceleration.

if_then_statement: IF traffic_density IS heavy AND current_speed IS high THEN comfort_efficiency IS low
description: Dense traffic at high speed should suppress efficiency bias.

if_then_statement: IF traffic_density IS heavy AND current_speed IS low THEN comfort_efficiency IS medium
description: Low speed in heavy traffic supports a balanced, patient style.

if_then_statement: IF road_slope IS flat AND traffic_density IS heavy AND current_speed IS low THEN comfort_efficiency IS medium
description: Flat roads remove some burden, but traffic still constrains comfort bias.

if_then_statement: IF road_slope IS flat AND traffic_density IS light AND current_speed IS high THEN comfort_efficiency IS medium
description: Open road invites pace keeping, but very high speed softens the comfort target.

if_then_statement: IF road_slope IS downhill AND traffic_density IS moderate AND current_speed IS low THEN comfort_efficiency IS high
description: Gentle downhill motion at low speed and moderate traffic invites smooth acceleration.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS critical THEN throttle_command IS zero
description: Critical risk removes throttle authority.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS high THEN throttle_command IS zero
description: High risk strongly suppresses throttle.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS medium THEN throttle_command IS light
description: Medium risk should keep throttle conservative by default.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS low THEN throttle_command IS medium
description: Low risk allows moderate throttle as a baseline.

if_then_statement: IF lane_stability IS strong_left THEN throttle_command IS zero
description: Strong left steering demand should suppress throttle to help stabilization.

if_then_statement: IF lane_stability IS strong_right THEN throttle_command IS zero
description: Strong right steering demand should suppress throttle to help stabilization.

if_then_statement: IF lane_stability IS left THEN throttle_command IS light
description: Moderate left steering demand should soften throttle.

if_then_statement: IF lane_stability IS right THEN throttle_command IS light
description: Moderate right steering demand should soften throttle.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS low AND lane_stability IS centered AND comfort_efficiency IS high THEN throttle_command IS strong
description: Low risk, centered lane, and high comfort preference invite stronger throttle.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS low AND lane_stability IS centered AND comfort_efficiency IS medium THEN throttle_command IS medium
description: Low risk with balanced comfort supports moderate throttle.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS low AND lane_stability IS centered AND comfort_efficiency IS low THEN throttle_command IS light
description: Low comfort preference restrains throttle even when risk is low.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS medium AND lane_stability IS centered AND comfort_efficiency IS high THEN throttle_command IS medium
description: When only moderately risky and laterally stable, comfort can keep some throttle.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS medium AND lane_stability IS centered AND comfort_efficiency IS medium THEN throttle_command IS light
description: Balanced medium-risk conditions justify only light throttle.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS high AND comfort_efficiency IS high AND lane_stability IS centered THEN throttle_command IS light
description: A residual comfort preference may keep only a trace of throttle when risk is high.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS critical THEN brake_command IS hard
description: Critical risk demands hard braking.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS high THEN brake_command IS hard
description: High risk requires decisive braking.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS medium THEN brake_command IS light
description: Medium risk should produce at least light braking by default.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS low THEN brake_command IS none
description: Low risk alone does not require braking.

if_then_statement: IF lane_stability IS strong_left THEN brake_command IS medium
description: Severe left steering demand benefits from stabilizing braking.

if_then_statement: IF lane_stability IS strong_right THEN brake_command IS medium
description: Severe right steering demand benefits from stabilizing braking.

if_then_statement: IF lane_stability IS left THEN brake_command IS light
description: Moderate left steering demand can justify light braking.

if_then_statement: IF lane_stability IS right THEN brake_command IS light
description: Moderate right steering demand can justify light braking.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS medium AND lane_stability IS strong_left THEN brake_command IS medium
description: Medium risk with large left correction demand calls for stabilizing braking.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS medium AND lane_stability IS strong_right THEN brake_command IS medium
description: Medium risk with large right correction demand calls for stabilizing braking.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS high AND lane_stability IS strong_left THEN brake_command IS hard
description: High risk and severe left lateral demand justify hard braking.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS high AND lane_stability IS strong_right THEN brake_command IS hard
description: High risk and severe right lateral demand justify hard braking.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS low AND lane_stability IS centered AND comfort_efficiency IS high THEN brake_command IS none
description: Low-risk comfortable cruising should avoid unnecessary braking.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS medium AND comfort_efficiency IS high AND lane_stability IS centered THEN brake_command IS none
description: Comfort introduces a competing no-brake tendency in medium risk.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS high AND comfort_efficiency IS high AND lane_stability IS centered THEN brake_command IS medium
description: High comfort adds a softer competing brake tendency against stronger safety rules.

if_then_statement: IF lane_stability IS strong_left THEN steering_correction IS steer_left_hard
description: A strong-left lane index maps to a hard left steering request.

if_then_statement: IF lane_stability IS left THEN steering_correction IS steer_left
description: Left correction demand maps to left steering.

if_then_statement: IF lane_stability IS centered THEN steering_correction IS keep
description: Centered lane state keeps the wheel near neutral.

if_then_statement: IF lane_stability IS right THEN steering_correction IS steer_right
description: Right correction demand maps to right steering.

if_then_statement: IF lane_stability IS strong_right THEN steering_correction IS steer_right_hard
description: A strong-right lane index maps to a hard right steering request.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS high AND lane_stability IS strong_left THEN steering_correction IS steer_left
description: High risk tempers a hard left correction into a slightly softer maneuver.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS high AND lane_stability IS strong_right THEN steering_correction IS steer_right
description: High risk tempers a hard right correction into a slightly softer maneuver.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS critical AND lane_stability IS strong_left THEN steering_correction IS steer_left
description: Critical risk discourages very abrupt steering while braking heavily.

if_then_statement: IF risk_level IS critical AND lane_stability IS strong_right THEN steering_correction IS steer_right
description: Critical risk discourages very abrupt steering while braking heavily.

if_then_statement: IF lane_stability IS centered AND comfort_efficiency IS high THEN steering_correction IS keep
description: High comfort preference reinforces smooth lane keeping.
